description: Website that serves as a portfolio for PanJohnny.
name: Website

categories.name: Concept
categories.content: The main page is designed to look like terminal. I wanted a cool portfolio site so I created this.

categories.name: Features
categories.content: The website is designed to be responsive and mobile friendly. It also has a nice looking design. There are plenty of commands that you can type in the terminal. You can also look at some of my other projects. More commands and stuff will be added in the future.
